executor: Claude (manager acting as worker — OpenClaw unavailable)

bot_core.py: Written to state.json on every loop tick
dashboard_server.py: _read_state() reads session_start_ts from state.json pnl block
Queries DB: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl_usd),0) FROM trades WHERE status='closed' AND ts_close >= session_start_ts
Adds session_pnl and session_start_ts to bankroll block in /api/state response
Graceful fallback: session_pnl=0.0 on DB error or missing session_start_ts

note: After restart, /api/state bankroll block will include session_pnl and session_start_ts fields
